data.title: Kibu releases quarterly cybersecurity threat report; offers solutions for security teams.
data.description: Los Angeles, Kibu debuted its quarterly threat report series on January 28, 2026. This series delves into new cybersecurity challenges, offering insights through actual cases and examples. It furnishes security teams with actionable solutions to combat these threats.

data.title: Sargento introduces new spicy cheese lines and snack packs to cater to Gen Z's preference, with 78% liking spicy foods.
data.description: A recent survey found that 78% of Generation Z individuals express a fondness for spicy foods. In response to this trend, Sargento has introduced a new range of products aimed at satisfying this preference for bold flavors. The company, based in Plymouth, Wisconsin, announced this development on January 28, 2026. Sargento is well-known for its natural cheeses and is a prominent player in the industry as a third-generation family-run business.

data.title: Spruce Power (NYSE: SPRU) decreases operational costs by expanding in-house field services teams, bolstering system performance.
data.description: In Houston, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU), a prominent owner and operator of distributed residential solar energy assets in the U.S., revealed progress in its aim to lower operating and maintenance expenses and enhance system performance. By growing its in-house field services teams, Spruce aims to achieve this. The recent expansion into New Jersey in early 2025 has been fruitful.

data.title: Middle market firms investing in AI and skills training (52% expect hiring needs); staffing pressures persist despite cooling labor market.
data.description: Despite the declining U.S. labor market, a recent report indicates that 52% of middle market executives anticipate facing notable staffing requirements in the upcoming year. This projection suggests that organizations are likely to have ongoing hiring needs despite the current trend of the job market cooling down.

data.title: Westinghouse and Tetra Tech Canada partner for AP1000® and AP300™ reactor projects in Ontario, leveraging Tetra Tech's engineering expertise and clean energy capacity.
data.description: A collaboration agreement has been signed between Westinghouse Electric Company and Tetra Tech Canada in Peterborough, Ontario. This memorandum of understanding (MoU) establishes a framework for cooperation in the advancement and implementation of AP1000® and AP300™ reactor projects in the region. Tetra Tech, known for its strong engineering capabilities and significant clean energy capacity in North America and the U.K., will provide support to Westinghouse under this agreement. The collaboration is intended to enhance the local project development efforts and promote the deployment of nuclear technologies in Ontario.

data.title: Data center industry sees growth but faces challenges as markets become competitive, says Foley report.
data.description: In the report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 8.2%, with a total of 2.5 million job losses in the past year. Additionally, the GDP growth rate has declined to 2.1%, marking a significant slowdown in the economy. The government has announced plans to invest $500 million in job creation programs to stimulate employment opportunities and boost economic recovery. Experts have raised concerns about the long-term effects of these economic challenges on the overall financial stability of the nation.

data.title: Geoprofessionals spend 25% of their time managing data. More than 1,000 surveyed struggle to utilize AI effectively.
data.description: In Christchurch, New Zealand, Seequent, a Bentley Subsurface company, has revealed in its 7th Geoprofessionals Data Management Report that mining and civil geoprofessionals are facing challenges in harnessing the potential of AI technology due to the complexities of handling diverse datasets. The report, based on a survey of over 1,000 geoprofessionals globally, indicates that teams are encountering difficulties in managing intricate datasets from various software platforms, unorganized historical data, and encountering substantial time constraints.

data.title: Technical Toolboxes acquires HUVR to enhance asset integrity data management, combining 30-year expertise with next-gen platform.
data.description: In Houston, Technical Toolboxes, a key player in critical assessment software for energy infrastructure, has recently acquired HUVR, a trailblazer in inspection data gathering and digital workflows for asset integrity programs. This acquisition merges Technical Toolboxes’ three-decade legacy and proficiency in pipeline and asset engineering software with HUVR’s innovative asset data platform. This strategic decision aims to revolutionize how the energy sector handles inspection records and compliance procedures.

data.title: OpenTable reveals Canada's Top 100 Romantic Restaurants for 2026 based on 900,000 diner reviews. 49% Canadians plan to dine out on Valentine’s Day, spending an average of 2 hours 14 minutes to book a spot. Cultural shifts in celebrating love at the table are also highlighted.
data.description: OpenTable has revealed Canada’s Top 100 Romantic Restaurants for 2026 prior to Valentine’s Day, using data from over 900,000 diner reviews, ratings, reservation demand, and the percentage of reviews labeled as “romantic.” Nearly half of Canadians (49%) plan to dine out this Valentine’s Day, with 40% finding it challenging to secure a reservation, spending an average of two hours and 14 minutes on the search. Apart from aiding in finding romantic dining spots, the list showcases cultural changes in celebrating love at restaurants, reflecting evolving traditions.

data.title: OpenX promotes 3 leaders across strategy, marketplace quality, and product to strengthen SSP, reflecting investment in intelligent platform.
data.description: In New York, OpenX Technologies, Inc., a top omnichannel supply-side platform, revealed the advancement of three executives in strategy, marketplace quality, and product. The moves showcase the company's ongoing commitment to enhancing its supply-side platform intelligence. With AI playing a key role in programmatic advertising by driving agents, targeting models, and decision-making, the demand for reliable media, credible data, and flexible solutions has heightened.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires The Alarm Group to expand security offerings in Oklahoma, continues as largest service provider.
data.description: In a recent development on January 28, 2026, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the leading fully integrated provider of fire protection, life safety, and security services in the U.S., announced the acquisition of The Alarm Group. This strategic move aims to enhance their offerings in comprehensive fire and life safety services. Pye-Barker Fire & Safety's position as the largest provider in the industry solidifies with this integration, demonstrating their commitment to expanding their reach and capabilities.

data.title: First Lady Melania Trump to ring NYSE bell for doc 'Melania'. NYSE provides daily pre-market update. Kristen delivers on Jan 28.
data.description: On January 28th, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update. This update, presented by Kristen Scholer, offers insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor to assist traders in making informed decisions before the market opens. Investors can access the latest information for the day to prepare for trading activities. Keep track of significant numbers and trends shared in the NYSE Pre-market update to stay ahead in the market.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS' AX Coin receives in-principle approval for stablecoin license from Central Bank of Bahrain.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Solowin Holdings, listed on NASDAQ as AXG, revealed that their subsidiary, AX Coin, of AlloyX Group, secured an In-Principle Approval letter for a stablecoin license from the Central Bank of Bahrain (CBB). This announcement positions AX Coin as a significant player in the financial technology sector, focusing on integrating traditional and digital assets. The final regulatory approval is pending, signifying a major milestone for the Company.

data.title: Later appoints Paige Kelly as GM, Creator to drive growth & engagement. Aim: connect creators & enterprise clients.
data.description: Paige Kelly has been appointed as the General Manager of Later, a leading influencer marketing company based in Boston, effective January 28, 2026. In her new role, Kelly will focus on driving growth, enhancing engagement, and facilitating connections between the company's creator community and enterprise clients. Later aims to leverage Kelly's expertise to strengthen its position in the market and increase its impact on the industry.

data.title: Tauth Labs certified by C2PA as Certificate Authority for content authentication. Jan. 28, 2026. Leading global platforms.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in New York, Tauth Labs Inc. received certification from the Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity (C2PA) as a Certificate Authority (CA) for issuing content authentication credentials. This accreditation positions Tauth Labs Inc. as a trusted entity in verifying the authenticity of digital content. The C2PA, backed by major technology and media corporations, recognizes Tauth Labs Inc.'s capability to validate the origin and integrity of online content.

data.title: DICK'S Sporting Goods launches Team USA Ambassadors program for Olympics 2026 with 9 athletes. #TeamUSA #WinterGames
data.description: Today, DICK'S Sporting Goods announced their ambassador program featuring nine distinguished Olympic and Paralympic athletes. The lineup includes Erin Jackson, Oksana Masters, Charlie McAvoy, Ilia Malinin, Red Gerard, Declan Farmer, Audrey Crowley, Korey Dropkin, and Caroline Harvey. This news was revealed on January 28, 2026, by the company based in Pittsburgh. The ticker symbol for DICK'S Sporting Goods is NYSE: DKS.

data.title: Residence acquires OK COOL, a social agency; expands global network. Acquisition emphasizes creator-led campaigns.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in London, the global network of creative companies Residence, a portfolio company of Gemspring Capital, revealed the purchase of OK COOL, a renowned creative agency recognized for its expertise in social-native storytelling and creator-led campaigns. This acquisition strengthens Residence's presence in the market and enhances its capabilities in delivering impactful campaigns.

data.title: iStock research highlights changing Winter Olympics experiences, suggests opportunities for small brands. Milan Cortina 2026.
data.description: Recent research findings from iStock, a renowned ecommerce platform catering to various businesses and creatives, indicate a significant change in the way sports are perceived and integrated into society as the Milan Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics and Paralympics draw closer. The study highlights a noticeable shift in the methods of experiencing, understanding, and incorporating sports into cultural contexts. This analysis is crucial as preparations for the event continue, with an estimated audience of millions worldwide expected to engage with the games both in person and through various media platforms.
